title: Yossi Matias on the golden age of research
summary: Yossi Matias, VP and Head of Google Research, discusses Google's approach to scaling research from breakthrough to real-world impact. The conversation covers applications in flood forecasting, medical AI, and scientific discovery tools, along with emerging technologies like speculative decoding and quantum computing.
writeup: Yossi Matias, VP and Head of Google Research, outlines how Google moves research from breakthrough to real-world impact, with applications in flood forecasting, medical AI, and scientific discovery tools. The discussion also covers emerging technologies including speculative decoding, test-time compute, and quantum computing. It matters because it frames the path from foundational research to deployed systems across domains. The takeaways center on scaling research for practical use and the role of generative AI in that progression.
